ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "governance_type" TEXT /* Type of governance (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "last_maintained" TEXT /* Date the station was last maintained or calibrated */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the station is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the station was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the station was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the station type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the station type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the station type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_station_types" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the measurement was taken */,
  "date_local" TEXT /* Local date and time of the measurement */,
  "pm2_5" REAL /* Concentration of PM2.5 (micrograms per cubic meter) */,
  "o3" REAL /* Concentration of O3 (parts per million) */,
  "no2" REAL /* Concentration of NO2 (parts per billion) */,
  "so2" REAL /* Concentration of SO2 (parts per billion) */,
  "co" REAL /* Concentration of CO (parts per million) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "recorded_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or system that recorded the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the measurement (e.g., 'valid', 'suspect', 'missing') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_measurements_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the pollutant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the pollutant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_pollutants" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the air quality measurement */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollutant */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the pollutant in the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES air_quality_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant that exceeded the threshold */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the pollutant */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES air_quality_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollutant */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the pollutant */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_pollutants" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollutant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "pollutant_id")
)
